name: EchoPark Automotive Grand Prix
comments: William Byron won the EchoPark Automaotive Grand Prix at Circuit of the Americas, his 12th NASCAR Cup Series victory.Prior to the start the following car dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason indicated: #17, 41, 66(unapproved adjustments).
